mechanism_by_architecture.cot: The R175H mutation destabilizes the p53 DNA-binding domain.
mechanism_by_architecture.blackboard: {'summary': "The R175H mutation in TP53 affects the DNA-binding surface of the protein, specifically in the beta-sandwich core region. The high pLDDT score at the residue (96.6) and the significant local contact density (25) indicate that the mutation has a substantial impact on the protein's structure.
